example: Tengo sueño, me voy a dormir.
exampleEn: I'm sleepy, I'm going to sleep.

example: Mi hija tiene miedo de la oscuridad.
exampleEn: My daughter is afraid of the dark.

example: Tienes razón, es mejor ir en metro.
exampleEn: You're right, it's better to go by subway.

example: Dejé las llaves en el bolso.
exampleEn: I left the keys in my purse.
Waiter, the check, please.
I want a coffee to go.
For the first course I want soup.
For the second course, meat with potatoes.
I want to book a double room.
Do you have a single room?
The hotel offers half board.
We prefer full board.
Leave the keys at the front desk.
The accommodation includes breakfast.
I'm only carrying carry-on luggage.

example: No encuentro mi tarjeta de embarque.
exampleEn: I can't find my boarding pass.

example: Pasamos por la aduana en el aeropuerto.
exampleEn: We went through customs at the airport.

example: Hicimos una excursión a la montaña.
exampleEn: We went on a trip to the mountain.

example: Los niños van a un campamento de verano.
exampleEn: The children go to a summer camp.

example: Las elecciones son el próximo mes.
exampleEn: The elections are next month.

example: Hubo una protesta en la plaza.
exampleEn: There was a protest in the square.
Do you have health insurance?

example: Necesitas una receta médica para esta medicina.
exampleEn: You need a prescription for this medicine.

example: Puedes congelar la sopa para después.
exampleEn: You can freeze the soup for later.

example: Hay que descongelar el pollo antes de cocinarlo.
exampleEn: You have to defrost the chicken before cooking it.

example: Voy a recalentar la comida de ayer.
exampleEn: I'm going to reheat yesterday's food.
Add two tablespoons of sugar.
Add a pinch of salt.

word: a la vuelta de la esquina
example: La farmacia está a la vuelta de la esquina.
exampleEn: The pharmacy is around the corner.

english: at the end of the street
example: El parque está al final de la calle.
exampleEn: The park is at the end of the street.

example: El restaurante está en frente del banco.
exampleEn: The restaurant is across from the bank.

example: Las olas del mar son muy grandes hoy.
exampleEn: The ocean waves are very big today.

example: Vimos la puesta de sol en la playa.
exampleEn: We watched the sunset at the beach.

example: La salida del sol fue espectacular.
exampleEn: The sunrise was spectacular.
Do you play any instrument?

example: La letra de esta canción es muy bonita.
exampleEn: The lyrics of this song are very beautiful.

example: Este cuadro es una obra de arte.
exampleEn: This painting is a work of art.

example: Hay muchas esculturas en el museo.
exampleEn: There are many sculptures in the museum.
His performance was excellent.
We rehearse every Wednesday.
I'm in a hurry, I can't stay.
I'm hot, open the window.
I'm cold, close the door.
The peaches are very sweet.
Buy pears at the market.
I buy yogurt at the dairy shop.

example: Hay una librería nueva en mi barrio.
exampleEn: There's a new bookstore in my neighborhood.
